subcodes.first_line: O thou who art directed by the Light of Guidance! The letter dated Dec. 2nd 1919 was received. Its meanings were revealing feelings of spirituality
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مهتدی بنور هدی نامه مورخ ۲ دسمبر سنه ۱۹۱۹ رسید از معانی احساسات روحانی
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual baptism, @spiritual transformation, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering
